#  Post an RFI in Portfolio Financials 
#####  Legacy
This information is intended for accounts with [Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/) product in Procore. Please reach out to your Procore point of contact for more information.
##  Background 
The RFIs page in the Bid Room is a powerful tool that allows you to manage RFIs from your vendors and keep information consistent across all bidders.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * 'Limited' access to the project or higher.  
_Note:_ Users with 'Limited' access must be on the Bid Room Team for the project.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the **Bid Room** you want to post an RFI in.
  2. Click the **RFIs** tab.
  3. Click **Post an RFI**.  
  
![Post An Rfi](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/cf03331fc43e9b3b62b239825898fde3/150bffefa12041f4d48862c66a81e370/post-an-rfi.png?fm=webp)  

  4. Enter your RFI question in the text box.
  5. _Optional:_ Assign a reference number to the RFI.
  6. _Optional:_ Attach a file to the RFI.
  7. Click **Post Question**.


## See Also
  * [Submit an RFI for a Portfolio Financials Project](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/tutorials/submit-an-rfi-for-a-portfolio-financials-project)
  * [Portfolio Financials - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/permissions)
  * [Post an Answer to an RFI in Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/tutorials/post-an-answer-to-an-rfi-in-portfolio-financials)
title: Post an RFI in Portfolio Financials
description: How to post an RFI in a Bid Room in Portfolio Financials.
